name: git-skills
description: GitHub PR lifecycle skills for opening, reviewing, merging, and completing PR workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Manage GitHub PR workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Git Skills adds reusable PR workflow skills for opening pull requests, analyzing and applying review feedback, running a merge gate, rebase-merging, and completing branch cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Open a PR for this branch.
Analyze the reviews on this PR.
